final_answer:
Add this to `preferences.md`:

```md
10. No assumptions. If scope/intent is not explicit, ask one direct clarification before acting.
11. User wording overrides agent interpretation. Do not reinterpret or broaden/narrow scope.
12. `answer here` means immediate answer-only mode: stop/avoid all commands and edits.
13. `implement` must be explicit. No code changes or command runs without that exact instruction.
14. If mode changes mid-thread (implement -> question), stop active work first, then answer.
15. For rebranding tasks, remove all legacy terms everywhere in requested scope, including URL/reference strings, unless user explicitly says to keep them.
16. Never trade requested scope for “safer” assumptions (compatibility, convenience, partial cleanup) without explicit approval.
17. Completion words (`done`, `fixed`, `complete`) only after full requested scope is verified.
```
prompt: Your asptions have cost me time, what should we include in preferences.md. ANSWER HERE YOU MISERABLE FUCK AND DON'T ADD SHIT
